commands.name: extract

options.name: --exit-on-duplicate-key
options.description:
Exit with error code 1 when duplicate translation keys are
found (useful for CI pipelines)

options.name: --format
options.description:
Export format: i18next (default, Crowdin i18next JSON), po
(GNU Gettext with source refs), json (full-fidelity debug)

options.name: --json
options.description:
Output raw JSON to stdout instead of rendered tables.
Auto-enabled when stdout is piped

options.name: --locale
options.description:
Filter to specific locales. Repeatable (-l da -l es-MX).
Omit to include all discovered locales

options.name: --on-duplicate-key
options.description:
Strategy for duplicate translation keys (same key,
different source text). 'first' (default) keeps the first-seen source text.
'skip' omits the key entirely

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output path: a file (e.g. out.po) or directory (e.g.
./translations). Auto-detected via extension. Omit to write to
stdout

options.name: --paths
options.description:
Path style for source references. 'relative' (default)
emits paths relative to the project root. 'absolute' preserves full filesystem
paths

options.name: --project
options.description:
One or more explicit project directories to scan.
Repeatable (-p dir1 -p dir2). Skips automatic project discovery

options.name: --source-only
options.description:
Suppress inline locale output (.For() per-locale source
texts). Show source-language entries only

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print per-project scanning progress to stderr

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
Root directory of the solution or project to scan. Defaults
to current directory

commands.description:
Scan Blazor projects for IStringLocalizer usage, extract source
strings, and export to a translation file (i18next JSON, PO, or generic 
JSON).

commands.description:
Show all detected IStringLocalizer calls and the resulting 
translation entries. Useful for debugging what the scanner sees before 
exporting.
